idea-plugin.name: copy-ai-reference
idea-plugin.description:
Copy Ai Reference 插件是一个用于复制代码引用的 idea 插件，旨在方便的复制代码引用（@路径#L行号-行尾号）给其他的AI CLI 或助手，提供的功能为:

1.用户在选择一个文件，右键选择Copy Ai Reference，插件复制@文件在代码中库的路径，例如：@src/main/kotlin/com/github/runtimeexcpetion/copyaireference/startup/MyProjectActivity.kt

2.用户在代码文件中选择多行代码，右键点击，出现弹出框，其中弹出框有一个选项，叫做 copyAiReference，插件会将选中的代码复制到剪贴板，格式为@选中的代码路径#L行号-行尾号，例如：@src/main/kotlin/com/github/runtimeexcpetion/copyaireference/startup/MyProjectActivity.kt#L10-15

The Copy Ai Reference plugin is an IntelliJ IDEA plugin designed to facilitate copying code references (in the format `@path#LstartLine-endLine`) for use with AI CLI tools or assistants. It offers the following features:

1. When a user selects a file and chooses "Copy Ai Reference" from the right-click menu, the plugin copies the file's path relative to the codebase—for example: `@src/main/kotlin/com/github/runtimeexcpetion/copyaireference/startup/MyProjectActivity.kt`.

2. When a user selects multiple lines of code within a file and right-clicks, a context menu appears containing the "copyAiReference" option; selecting this copies the reference to the clipboard in the format `@path#LstartLine-endLine`—for example: `@src/main/kotlin/com/github/runtimeexcpetion/copyaireference/startup/MyProjectActivity.kt#L10-15`.

action.description: Copy relative path to AI reference format
Copy relative path and line numbers to AI reference format
